message:
feat(server): add persistent replica connection with ACK loop and reconnect backoff

Replace one-shot replica sync with a stateful ReplicaSyncState that
maintains the TCP connection across event loop ticks:

- Add ReplicaSyncState with connection slot and retry_after_ms backoff
- Add write_buf and next_ack_ms for periodic REPLCONF ACK messages
- Add flush_replica_primary_writes() for non-blocking write drain
- Add replication_stream_follow_up_bytes() for forwarding replicated
  writes to the store
- Refactor drive_replica_sync to read streaming commands, dispatch
  through command router, and send periodic offset ACKs
- Schedule retry with 250ms backoff on disconnect/error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
